title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Postcard Hotels

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Postcard Hotels
jsonLd.description:
We at Postcard Hotels are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Postcard Hotels:
Postcard Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Postcard Hotels!
